info.title: Smart Home API
info.description: Comprehensive REST API for the Smart Home property management platform. Covers Authentication, User & Profile management, Property listings, Payments, Wishlists, Activity Logs, Addresses, Carousels, and Currency.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Authentication — register, login, logout, password reset, Google OAuth, token refresh

tags.name: Profile
tags.description: User profile, settings, 2FA, notifications, activity logs

tags.name: Property
tags.description: Property listings — create, search, manage, favourite, feature, publish

tags.name: Payment
tags.description: Paystack payment initialisation, verification, webhooks & transaction history

tags.name: ActivityLog
tags.description: System activity logs per user or vendor

bearerAuth.description: Provide your JWT access token. Obtain one via POST /api/auth/login.

BadRequest.description: Validation error or missing required fields

get.description: Returns server status and MongoDB connection state.

post.description: Checks if email is available and sends a verification OTP to the provided email address.

post.summary: Get accounts linked to a recovery email
Send account recovery token via recovery email

302.description: Redirect to success or failure URL with token

post.summary: Verify Google ID token (mobile / SPA flow)

get.summary: Get current user's own activity logs
Get token to reset transaction PIN

patch.summary: Update application UI preferences (theme, language, etc.)

get.summary: Get property statistics for current admin/owner

200.description: Statistics: total, active, inactive, featured, premium, avgPrice

get.summary: List properties owned by the authenticated admin

post.summary: Create a new property listing (admin only)
Toggle featured status on a property (admin only)
Toggle premium status on a property (admin only)
Verify / approve a property listing (admin only)
Verify a Paystack payment by reference

post.description: Receives and processes Paystack event webhooks. Secured via Paystack-Signature header validation.

get.summary: Get payment transaction history for current user

post.summary: Add a property to the wishlist

delete.summary: Remove a property from the wishlist

get.summary: Get activity logs for a specific user
Get activity logs for a vendor
Get all addresses for current user
